description: This episode of Solana Bytes discusses the transfer fee extension on the token 2022 program, explaining how to configure and collect transfer fees at the protocol level. It covers the setup of a new token mint, the transfer process, and how to withdraw withheld fees from accounts.
topic_summary: The video explains the implementation of transfer fees in the Solana token program, detailing the process of setting up a mint with a transfer fee extension and managing withheld fees from transactions [t=0:24 - t=400:55].
